prompt:
A compact 300 W pure sine inverter on a workbench, showing two grounded AC outlets on its face and thick DC leads exiting the other side. A small inline fuse and a battery pack are visible in soft focus, emphasizing safe power conversion without any brand markings or readable labels.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 with a near-future off-grid workshop aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, clean cable management, no logos, no readable text, no overlays. Frame the inverter prominently so its outlets and compact form read clearly as an icon.
